translations: the life (of) the world but they
puzzle.hint: This verse highlights the human tendency to focus on material existence while neglecting the eternal life to come.
puzzle.arabic: يَعْلَمُونَ ظَـٰهِرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمْ غَـٰفِلُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: They know what is apparent of the worldly life, but they, of the Hereafter, are unaware.
